title: Impact of trop-2 expression on the efficacy of trop-2-targeted antibody-drug conjugates in metastatic breast cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
abstract: Trophoblast cell surface antigen 2 (Trop-2) is expressed across multiple tumors, including breast cancer (bc). Antibody-drug conjugates targeting Trop-2 (ADC-T2) have demonstrated efficacy in metastatic bc (mBC). However, the extent to which clinical benefit varies according to Trop-2 expression remains unclear.
